response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and captured on-screen text for song titles and credits: "ULTRA C" (00:01), "Dizzy Dizzy" (01:06), "Ready Steady" (04:37). 2. Identified primary producer 'Giga' for all songs to simplify search. 3. Executed searches: '"ULTRA C" Giga Japanese and English lyrics', '"Dizzy Dizzy" Giga Japanese and English lyrics', '"Ready Steady" Giga Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Mapped songs to chronological scenes based on performance flow.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performance by various Hololive VTubers, featuring popular Vocaloid-style tracks produced by Giga. The performance consists of three distinct songs with transitional segments for stage setup and crowd interaction.

scenes.description: First song of the medley, "ULTRA C", performed by a group of VTubers. Text in bottom corner identifies the song and credits.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive VTubers (Moona Hoshinova, Pavolia Reine, Takanashi Kiara)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
この路地を抜けろ awake now
(Whoa 僕ら覚醒 アップデート hey)
ギラギラ光らせた いいな いいな そのカラット
目立っちゃうな自然に視線を独り占め
この手口は盗めない
答えなら「好きなだけ」が極まってく
一秒前完全アップデート yeah
不安ぐっばい 自分以外は敵じゃない
お利口 ゴミ用 指を立てろ
ハ〜 揺れろ運命
Ah〜あたらしいウルトラC
その感情を燃料...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Escape this alleyway, awake now
(Whoa, we're awakening, update, hey)
Those glitzy glares, how nice, how nice, that carat
It stands out, naturally capturing all the attention
This trick can't be stolen
If you ask for the answer, "as much as I like" is reaching its limit
One second before complete update, yeah
Anxiety, goodbye, there's no enemy but myself
Clever, useless, raise your fingers
Ah, shake, destiny
Ah, a brand new ultra C
Fueling those emotions...

scenes.description: Interlude featuring pyro effects, stage movement, and audience cheering.
Second song of the medley, "Dizzy Dizzy", performed by the VTuber group. Text identifies song and credits.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive VTubers (Takanashi Kiara, Pavolia Reine, etc.)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Make me dizzy, dizzy, dizzy
There's a place where we break the line
Make it a circle redefined
Beautiful gardens, eternal flowers
You know the way, so take me there
Won’t you make me dizzy from your kisses?
Will you take my hand and spin me?
Take me back to the beginning again
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:

scenes.description: Interlude featuring instrumental music and audience interaction.
Third song of the medley, "Ready Steady", performed by the VTuber group. Text identifies song and credits.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive VTubers (Pavolia Reine, Moona Hoshinova, etc.)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ローリスクじゃ物足りなくなっちゃったし
有り余って笑っちゃうくらい
なんも無いなんて言ったってしょうがないし
お手上げで Hi-Five
前ならえで後に続いたってつまんねえ
夢を語れ、追え!が この街のStandard
ただ見てたいだけ
なんてのは嘘...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Low-risk just isn't enough for me anymore
There's so much left in me, I could laugh
It's no use saying there's nothing here
Give up, high-five
Following the leader, following behind is boring
Tell your dreams, follow them! That is this city's standard
Just wanting to watch
That's a lie...
